title: Aligent AppBuilder workspace
description: Scaffolds a new Aligent AppBuilder monorepo (workspace shell only — apps are added via the `app` generator).

name.description: Workspace name (kebab-case). Used as the @aligent/<name> npm package name and the workspace directory name.
name.x-prompt: What is the workspace name? (kebab-case, e.g. 'acme-apps')

nodeVersion.description: Target Node.js version pinned in .nvmrc and used as the lower bound of engines.node (e.g. 22.18.0).
nodeVersion.x-prompt: What is the target Node.js version?
nodeVersion.patternErrorMessage: Node.js version must be a valid semver, e.g. 22.18.0 or 24.0.1
